summary: Iteration 2 validated the new POST /api/decode endpoint (Claude Sonnet via Emergent LLM) and the LiveDemo + Stats UI components added between Hero and DocumentCard. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests pass (6 new /api/decode + 8 existing subscribe/count). Frontend: every required data-testid renders, sample buttons populate the textarea, Decode button correctly toggles disabled/enabled, end-to-end LLM call returned a real plain-English translation with confidence in 0-100 and 3 jargon-strike spans on the original quote. Stats values '500+', '12 min', '94%' all correct. Nav CTA, Hero CTA scroll to signup; footer email submission shows the sonner success toast.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/decode correctly validates min_length=4 / max_length=1200 via Pydantic Field — confirmed 422 for empty/too-short/too-long.

LLM response parsing is robust: strips ``` fences, slices first '{' to last '}', clamps confidence to [0,100], coerces flagged_phrases to list[str], rejects empty translation with 502. Good defensive handling.
LlmChat session_id is per-request UUID (`decode-{uuid4()}`) so no cross-request memory leakage — correct for stateless decode.
Frontend highlightJargon escapes regex metacharacters and uses case-insensitive matching — verified 3 jargon-strike spans rendered on sample 1.
Decode button disabled state correctly tied to `loading || !text.trim()` — verified.
Minor (non-blocking): /api/decode has no rate limiting — could be abused to burn LLM credits. Consider per-IP throttle before public launch.
Minor (non-blocking): when LLM returns malformed JSON the backend raises 502 with a generic detail; frontend already shows a friendly toast so UX is fine.

Minor (non-blocking): server.py logger is configured AFTER routes that call logger.exception/logger.error are defined; works because logging.basicConfig is invoked at import time before requests arrive, but ordering is fragile — consider moving logging setup to top of file.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this MVP
seed_data_creation: Test subscribers prefixed with test_/idemp_/count_/MIXED_/uitest_ added to subscribers collection. /api/decode is stateless and writes nothing to DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression suite: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v (14 tests, ~5s including 2 real LLM calls). /api/decode uses real Anthropic Claude — use timeout>=45s. LiveDemo result selectors: [data-testid=decode-result|decode-translation|decode-confidence|decode-original]; jargon spans are <span class='jargon-strike'> inside decode-original. Sample 1 contains 'prudent approach to capital allocation'.
